---
description: "Prepare a clean checkpoint update for the next session. Use when wrapping up work and the repo needs a short, honest handover note."
name: "Update Checkpoint"
argument-hint: "What changed in this session"
agent: "agent"
---

Read [checkpoint](../../docs/checkpoint.md) and [devlog](../../docs/devlog.md).

Then produce a concise update that covers:
- current task
- what now works
- what is still broken, missing, or untested
- the last check run and result
- the next prompt to use in the next session
